scripts.build:prod: cross-env JEKYLL_ENV=production bundle exec jekyll build
scripts.dev: cross-env JEKYLL_ENV=development bundle exec jekyll serve --host 127.0.0.1 --livereload --drafts
scripts.dev-mini: cross-env JEKYLL_ENV=production bundle exec jekyll serve --livereload --drafts
scripts.dev-live: cross-env JEKYLL_ENV=production bundle exec jekyll serve --livereload
